---
title: "Alpha Diversity"
author: "Nitin Bayal"
format: html
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Introduction

This document reports on a microbiota project results of alpha diversity across different diets and visits.

```{r variables}
# Alpha diversity
index <- "shannon"
```

```{r data}
source("funct.R")
tse <- readRDS("../data/tse.Rds")
```

## Group-wise comparisons

- **Index:** `r index`
- **Group variable:** `r variable`


```{r pvalues}
# Calculate p-values
pvals <- pairwise.wilcox.test(
    colData(tse)[[index]],
    colData(tse)[[variable]],
    p.adjust.method = "fdr")

# convert to data.frame 
pvals <- pvals[["p.value"]] |> as.data.frame()
varname <- "group1"
pvals[[varname]] <- rownames(pvals)

# convert to long format
pvals <- reshape(
    pvals,
    direction = "long",
    varying = colnames(pvals)[ !colnames(pvals) %in% varname ],
    times = colnames(pvals)[ !colnames(pvals) %in% varname ],
    v.names = "p",
    timevar = "group2",
    idvar = "group1"
    ) |>
    na.omit()

# Add y-axis position for the p-value info
pvals[["y.position"]] <- apply(pvals, 1, function(x){
    temp1 <- tse[[index]][ tse[[variable]] == x[["group1"]] ]
    temp2 <- tse[[index]][ tse[[variable]] == x[["group2"]] ]
    temp <- max( c(temp1, temp2) )
    return(temp)
})
pvals[["y.position"]] <- max(pvals[["y.position"]]) +
    order(pvals[["y.position"]]) * 0.2

# Round the p-values
pvals[["p"]] <- round(pvals[["p"]], 3)
```


## Visualization

```{r boxplot}
# Create a boxplot
library(scater)
p <- plotColData(
    tse, x = variable, y = index,
    show_boxplot = TRUE,
    show_violin = FALSE) +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 10)) #+
    # This uses different p-value calculation than the table,
    # so let's remove temporarily and fix later
    # ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(pvals)
print(p)
```

## Table of the top findings

```{r table-of-findings}
# FIXME: simplify run_diversity_tests!
# Ideally, it could be included here in this file it is not too long
final_results <- run_diversity_tests(tse, comparisons, variable, index)
datatable(final_results, 
        options = list(pageLength = 10), 
        caption = paste("Table of the top findings"))
```


## Data Summary

```{r data-summary}
tse
```

## Version info


```{r sessioninfo}
sessionInfo()
```
